title: conchocarpus dasyanthus
intro: Conchocarpus dasyanthus, also known as the Wild Orange or Rough-leaved Conchocarpus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cunoniaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark and leaves, which contain flavonoids and phenolic compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Conchocarpus dasyanthus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support immune function, making it a popular remedy for various ailments in traditional medicine. Conchocarpus dasyanthus can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used to treat conditions such as fever, sore throats, and respiratory infections.
